Metadata.title: Doris Numerology
Metadata.description: Professional numerology readings and spiritual guidance by Doris.

Home.title: Welcome to the Mystical World of Numerology
Home.subtitle: Discover Your Life's Hidden Patterns
Home.description: I am Doris, a professional numerologist dedicated to helping you unlock the secrets of numbers and their profound influence on your life journey. Through ancient wisdom and modern insight, I guide you toward understanding your true purpose and potential.
Home.feature1Body: Discover your core life purpose and destiny through your birth date.
Home.feature2Body: Get personalized insights into your relationships, career, and life decisions.
Home.feature3Body: Connect with your higher self and find clarity in life's challenges.
Home.trustLine: 40+ years of experience in education and personal guidance

About.title: About Doris
About.subtitle: Your Guide to the Mystical World of Numbers
About.introduction: Welcome to my world of numerology, where ancient wisdom meets modern insight to illuminate your life's path.
About.storyContent: For over 15 years, I have dedicated my life to studying the profound connections between numbers and human destiny. My journey began when I discovered how the numbers in my own birth date revealed patterns that explained my life experiences and guided me toward my true calling.
About.approachContent: Each reading is a sacred journey of discovery. I combine traditional numerological methods with intuitive insights to provide you with practical guidance that you can apply to your daily life. My goal is to empower you with knowledge and clarity.
About.credentialsContent: I am a certified numerologist with extensive training in both Western and Eastern numerological traditions. I have helped thousands of individuals discover their life path numbers, understand their personal year cycles, and make informed decisions about their future.
About.ctaBody: Let's begin your journey of self-discovery and spiritual growth.

Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Discover Your Path Through Numerology
Services.description: I believe that every person is born with unique potential and a purpose in life. Numerology is a powerful tool that can help us understand our personal map, where our strengths lie, what our challenges are, and how we can live more fulfilling and meaningful lives.

items.title: Personal Numerology Consultation
items.description: In-depth analysis of your personal numbers and revealing the potential, challenges, and opportunities in your life.

items.title: Important Life Decisions
items.description: Guidance in making important decisions about location, relationships, and career paths.

Testimonials.title: Testimonials
Testimonials.body: Real recommendations from clients — shared via WhatsApp

items.text: Doris is amazing and deeply professional. I came to her skeptical and left surprised by the accuracy. She is full of positive energy and gives a wonderful feeling and a lot of confidence. I recommend her with all my heart ❤️❤️❤️

For Doris Tsadok's website:

I came to Doris out of curiosity and received far more than I expected.
With warmth, sensitivity, and amazing accuracy, Doris saw the deepest things — strengths, dilemmas, and the right directions for me.

The session was fascinating, empowering, and precise, and left me with clarity, confidence, and real tools for the road ahead.
Beyond great professionalism, Doris has a rare ability to listen, hold space, and guide from an authentic, human place.

I wholeheartedly recommend her to anyone seeking guidance, precision, and meaningful life insights.

An amazing experience! Doris is professional, precise, and very sensitive.
I felt that things simply connected for me in the most right way.
I got answers to many questions that had accompanied me.
Warmly recommended to anyone seeking guidance.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.body: Fill out the form below and we'll reach out on WhatsApp.
Contact.trustLine: 40+ years of experience — personal, caring guidance

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for Doris Numerology, including how we handle contact form data and WhatsApp messaging.
Privacy.intro: Doris Numerology ("we", "us") respects your privacy. This policy explains how this website handles your privacy, especially regarding the contact form and WhatsApp.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body: We do not collect or store personal information on this website.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.body:
The contact form is used only to send your inquiry to us via WhatsApp so we can respond to your request about numerology services.

By submitting the form, you agree that we may contact you at the phone number you provided to respond to your inquiry.

sections.title: WhatsApp Messaging
sections.body:
Our website uses the WhatsApp Business Platform (provided by Meta) to deliver your inquiry to Doris Numerology. When you submit the contact form:

• Your name, phone number, and message details are sent through Meta's WhatsApp API so we can receive and respond to your request.
• Meta processes this data according to the WhatsApp Privacy Policy (https://www.whatsapp.com/legal/privacy-policy) and Meta's terms.
• We use WhatsApp only to handle inquiries you initiate through our website—not for unsolicited marketing messages.
• Message delivery depends on WhatsApp and your device settings.

sections.title: Sharing of Information
sections.body:
We do not sell or rent your personal information.

We share data only with service providers needed to operate the website and contact flow (for example, hosting providers and Meta/WhatsApp for message delivery), and only to the extent required for those services.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.body: We do not store personal information on our website servers. WhatsApp messages are retained according to WhatsApp settings and Meta's policies.

sections.title: Your Rights and Opt-Out
sections.body:
You may:

• Choose not to submit the contact form if you do not want us to contact you via WhatsApp or phone.
• Ask us to stop contacting you at any time by replying to a WhatsApp message.

To exercise these rights, contact us via WhatsApp.

sections.title: Security
sections.body: Inquiries from the website are transmitted securely according to the WhatsApp Business API (Meta) security protocol.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page will reflect the latest version. Continued use of the website after changes means you accept the updated policy.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.body: For privacy questions or requests, contact Doris Numerology through the contact form on this website or via WhatsApp after submitting an inquiry.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.metaDescription: Terms of service for Doris Numerology website and numerology consultation services.
Terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the Doris Numerology website and related services. By using this website or submitting the contact form, you agree to these Terms.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using this website, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the website.

sections.title: Services
sections.body:
Doris Numerology provides numerology consultations, guidance, and related informational services. All content and sessions are for personal insight and educational purposes only.

Our services do not constitute medical, psychological, legal, or financial advice. You should not rely on numerology readings as a substitute for professional advice in those areas.

sections.title: Use of the Website
sections.body:
You agree to use this website lawfully and only for its intended purpose—learning about our services and contacting us regarding numerology consultations.

You may not misuse the contact form, attempt to disrupt the website, or submit false or misleading information.

sections.title: Contact Form and WhatsApp
sections.body:
When you submit the contact form, you authorize us to contact you via WhatsApp or phone at the number you provide, in order to respond to your inquiry.

Message delivery depends on WhatsApp, your device, and applicable third-party services. We are not responsible for delays or failures caused by third-party platforms.

sections.title: No Guarantees
sections.body: Numerology readings and guidance are subjective and interpretive. We do not guarantee specific outcomes, accuracy of predictions, or results from following any advice received during a consultation.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.body: All website content—including text, images, branding, and design—is owned by Doris Numerology or used with permission. You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute website content without prior written consent.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.body:
To the fullest extent permitted by law, Doris Numerology shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the website or services.

Your use of the website and any consultations is at your own discretion and risk.

sections.title: Changes to These Terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page reflects the latest version. Continued use of the website after changes means you accept the updated Terms.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: For questions about these Terms, contact Doris Numerology through the contact form on this website or via WhatsApp after submitting an inquiry.

WhatsAppForm.heading: Contact via WhatsApp
WhatsAppForm.invalidPhone: Enter a valid Israeli phone number (e.g. 0512345678)
